Ability Description: Ignore SHD and deal DMG to HP instead. Exhaust.
Deal 1 DMG to all Revealed enemy Entities.
Gain +1 ATK and Heal 1 SHD upon hit.
Reveal an ally Entity without activating their Ability
Remove a Status from one Entity.
Negate any Statuses applied this Phase.
If your Synergy is activated, Negate all Effect cards played by the opponent.
Negate the first Effect card played by the opponent. Immediate Effect cards aren't affected.
Hide all of your Revealed ally Entities.
Reveal an enemy Entity without activating their Ability.
Opponent puts their hand back into their Effect deck, shuffles, and draws 2 Effect cards.
Changes the ally Entity's Set into a set of a Revealed Entity this Phase.
Transfer a Status onto one of your Entities.
Search your Discard pile and take 1 Effect card into your hand.
